---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a reusable improvement for the toolkit
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or workflow improvement.

## Use Case

Who would use this, and what public-safe workflow would it improve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected behavior or output.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or existing approaches that could address the same need.

## Public-Safe Example

Provide a placeholder example only. Do not include private thesis text, unpublished research data, personal information, or institution-specific details.

## Contribution Interest

Would you be willing to help implement, test, or document this feature?
